basic_details.job_title: IWAI Upper Division Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Inland Waterways Authority of India (IWAI) Upper Division Clerk (UDC) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.iwai.nic.in . A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the IWAI UDC Recruitment 2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Holding analogous post, 5 years' service in the grade of LDC or equivalent
qualification.details: Officers holding analogous post OR with 5 years' service in the grade of LDC or equivalent in Central/State Government or Autonomous bodies or Public Sector Undertakings.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level 4 in the Pay Matrix as per 7th CPC
salary_details.details: Level 4 in the Pay Matrix as per 7th CPC

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IWAI Upper Division Clerk (UDC) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.iwai.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IWAI UDC recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the IWAI Upper Division Clerk (UDC) recruitment is 17-05-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the UDC post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Upper Division Clerk (UDC) post in the Inland Waterways Authority of India (IWAI) recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for the UDC post?
faq.answer: To be eligible, candidates must be holding an analogous post or have 5 years of service in the grade of LDC or equivalent in Central/State Government or Autonomous bodies or Public Sector Undertakings.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the UDC position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Upper Division Clerk (UDC) post is 56 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the UDC post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the UDC post will be placed at Level 4 in the Pay Matrix as per the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC).

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the IWAI UDC recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the IWAI Upper Division Clerk (UDC) recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Inland Waterways Authority of India (IWAI), which is www.iwai.nic.in.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates along with the application form.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Deputation.
